title: helianthus pallidus
intro: Helianthus pallidus, also known as the Pale Sunflower or Pale Daisy, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Helianthus pallidus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable herb for preventing chronic diseases. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a natural dye.
